name: V2 - District to URA Batch Mapping

nodes.name: Manual Trigger
nodes.notes: Manual trigger only. Do not activate automatically.

nodes.name: Read Central - Property Registry
nodes.notes: Reads only from Clarity V2 - Central Database / Property Registry. Does not read boss sheets.

nodes.name: Map District to URA Batch
nodes.notes: Maps D01-D07 to batch 1, D08-D14 to batch 2, D15-D21 to batch 3, D22-D28 to batch 4. Outputs only rows that need URA Batch update.

nodes.name: Update Central - Property Registry
nodes.notes: Writes only to Clarity V2 - Central Database / Property Registry. Matches on Source Key. Updates URA Batch only for rows that need mapping.

meta.description: Maps Property Registry District values into URA transaction API batch numbers.
safety: Reads and writes only Clarity V2 Central Database / Property Registry
Does not read or write boss sheets
Only rows with populated District and missing/outdated URA Batch are updated
